segments.text: Reading from Srimad Bhagavatam, Canto No. 3, Chapter No. 16, Text No. 33-35.
33 and 34 I will read myself and 35 will chant together.
Tautu Girvana Rishabhau, Dustara Dharidokataha, Hatashriyau Brahmashapad, Abhutam Vigatasamayu.
But those two gatekeepers, the best of the demigods, their beauty and luster diminished by the curse of the brahmanas,
became morose and fell from Vaikuntha, the abode of the Supreme.
Then as Jaya and Vijaya fell from the Lord's abode, a great roar of disappointment arose from all the demigods
who were sitting in the splendid airplanes.
Tau eva hi adhuna, taap tau, paashada paravarao hari, diter jathara nirvishthyam,
diter jathara nirvishthyam, kashyapam teja ulbanam.
Translation and purport by His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swamishila Prabhupada.
Lord Brahma continued, those two principal doorkeepers of the personality of Godhead
have now entered the womb of Diti, the powerful semen of Kashyapa Muni, having covered them.
Here is a clear proof of how a living entity coming originally from Vaikuntha Loka is encaged in material elements.
The living entity takes shelter within the semen of a father,
which is injected within the womb of a mother,
and with the help of the mother's emulsified ovium, the living entity grows a particular type of body.
In this connection it is to be remembered that the mind of Kashyapa Muni was not in order
when he conceived the two sons, Hiranyakasha and Hiranyakashyapu.
Therefore the semen he discharged was simultaneously extremely powerful and mixed with the quality of anger.
It is to be concluded that while conceiving a child, the mind of Kashyapa Muni was not in order.
It is to be concluded that while conceiving a child, the mind of Kashyapa Muni was not in order.
One's mind must be very sober and devotional.
For this purpose the Garbhodana Samskara is recommended in the Vedic scriptures.
If the mind of the father is not sober, the semen discharge will not be very good.
Thus the living entity wrapped in the matter produced from the father and mother will be demoniac like Hiranyakasha and Hiranyakashyapu.
The conditions of conception are to be carefully studied.
